person.name: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin

nameForms.fullText: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin

km.Glamorgan, Wales: ហ្គឡាម៉ូរហ្គាន, វ៉ាឡិស

zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin於大約1358年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根。她和Evan Ap Evan or Gethin至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin于大约1358年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根。她和Evan Ap Evan or Gethin至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Evan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (southern): from the personal name Evan, itself from Ieuan, a Welsh derivative of Latin Johannes (English John). See Evans .

variants.name: Bevan
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Iefan ‘son of Evan’, with fused patronymic marker (a)p. Compare Evan and Evans .

variants.name: Heaven
meanings: Welsh: variant of   Evan  .
English: variant of   Haven  .
Irish (Tipperary): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEimhín ‘descendant of Eimhín’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of éimh ‘swift’, ‘prompt, ready’.

variants.name: Haven
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) harbor’, from Middle English haven (Old English hæfen ‘haven’).
Welsh (Monmouthshire): variant of   Evan  .
Dutch: variant of Haveman , or possibly a topographic name from haven ‘port, harbour’. See also De Haven .

variants.name: Evans
meanings: Welsh: derivative of Evan , from Efan, Ifan, medieval forms of Ieuan (from Latin Johannes, the source of English John), dating from c. 1500, with the post-medieval patronymic suffix -s. Welsh Sion was a separate borrowing of English John, and Evan (Ieuan) and Sion developed as independent names.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).
Chinese: variant of   Ge  .

nameMeanings.name: Gethin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gethin, perhaps a soft-mutated form of cethin ‘dusky, swarthy’.

variants.name: Getting
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of   Gethin  .
Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Gutyn, a pet form of Gruffudd (see Griffith ), mainly found in north Wales.
German: very rare variant of Gettig or Götting (see Goetting ) and, in North America, also an altered form of the latter.

nameMeanings.name: Evan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a Welsh name this represents an Anglicized form of Iefan , a later development of Ieuan . As a Scottish name it is a variant of Euan . It is now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin was born about 1358, in Glamorgan, Wales. She had at least 1 daughter with Evan Ap Evan or Gethin.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin est née environ 1358, à Glamorgan, Galles. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Evan Ap Evan or Gethin.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin wurde um 1358 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren. Sie hatte mit Evan Ap Evan or Gethin mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin è nata il circa 1358 nel Glamorgan, Galles. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Evan Ap Evan or Gethin.

ja.Glamorgan, Wales: ウェールズグラモーガン
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethinは約1358年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた。彼女はEvan Ap Evan or Gethinとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin(은)는 대략 1358년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Evan Ap Evan or Gethin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin nasceu aproximadamente 1358, em Glamorgan, Gales. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Evan Ap Evan or Gethin.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin родилась около 1358 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Evan Ap Evan or Gethin.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin nació aproximadamente 1358, en Glamorgan, Gales. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Evan Ap Evan or Gethin.

th.about 1358–: ประมาณปี 1358–ถึงแก่กรรม
